subcodes.first_line: O thou dear companion, at a time when the fire of war hath set the world aflame and with each passing day doth increasingly intensify [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوست موافق در وقتیکه آتش حرب در اطراف جهان شعله زده و روز بروز در ازدیاد
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @war and peace, @unity; oneness of humanity, @love and unity
